title: Quote of the Day

posts.author: Aschne43 (Anne Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml: i’d love to know where the collection of quotes are populating from, as i have found that the daily quotes all happen to be from white older males - is this just a coincidence? i love the feature, but want to promote all gender/race/age/sexual orientation as the inspiring quotes shared to my team. bummer.
